body:
### (!Discontinued to to changes from Server site!, sadly wont work like this anymore)
# Minecraft Drop Counter Mod 1.20.1
This is a mod written for the "Cactus Clicker" mode on the Minecraft Server playlegend.net. 

It counts the drops that you receive in Aincraft. 

Every drop received while this mod is active, is displayed on the top left corner of the screen.
## Will only count cards/statues and wood/ores
The change for the drops to be displayed in the action bar does intefer with the way the Mod counts the drops. It will no longer recognize Material drops from Mobs.
